prompt_en: Say that you are Chinese.
acceptable_answers: 我是中国人。

prompt_en: Ask someone what their name is.
acceptable_answers: 你叫什么名字？
你叫什么？

prompt_en: Say that you want to drink water.
acceptable_answers: 我想喝水。
我要喝水。

prompt_en: Say that you have two cats.
acceptable_answers: 我有两只猫。
我有两个猫。

prompt_en: Say that this is your book.
acceptable_answers: 这是我的书。

prompt_en: Ask how much this costs.
acceptable_answers: 这个多少钱？
这多少钱？

prompt_en: Say that you do not like coffee.
acceptable_answers: 我不喜欢咖啡。
我不喜欢喝咖啡。

prompt_en: Ask someone where they are.
acceptable_answers: 你在哪儿？
你在哪里？

prompt_en: Say that today is Monday.
acceptable_answers: 今天是星期一。
今天星期一。

prompt_en: Say that you are going home.
acceptable_answers: 我回家。
我要回家。

prompt_en: Say that he is a doctor.
acceptable_answers: 他是医生。
他是一个医生。

prompt_en: Ask what time it is now.
acceptable_answers: 现在几点？
现在几点了？

prompt_en: Say that you can speak a little Chinese.
acceptable_answers: 我会说一点中文。
我会说一点儿中文。

prompt_en: Say that you are at school.
acceptable_answers: 我在学校。

prompt_en: Ask someone if they are busy.
acceptable_answers: 你忙吗？
你忙不忙？

prompt_en: Say that the food is very delicious.
acceptable_answers: 菜很好吃。
这个菜很好吃。

prompt_en: Say that you want to buy an apple.
acceptable_answers: 我想买一个苹果。
我要买苹果。

prompt_en: Say that you are watching TV at home.
acceptable_answers: 我在家看电视。
我在家里看电视呢。

prompt_en: Say that you go to school by bus every day.
acceptable_answers: 我每天坐公共汽车去学校。
我每天坐公交车上学。

prompt_en: Say that the weather today is very good.
acceptable_answers: 今天天气很好。
今天的天气很好。

prompt_en: Say that you have already finished your homework.
acceptable_answers: 我做完作业了。
我的作业做完了。

prompt_en: Ask someone if they have eaten yet.
acceptable_answers: 你吃了吗？
你吃饭了吗？

prompt_en: Say that your room is very clean.
acceptable_answers: 我的房间很干净。
我房间很干净。

prompt_en: Say that you walked from home to school.
acceptable_answers: 我从家走到学校。
我从家走到学校的。

prompt_en: Say that your older sister is taller than you.
acceptable_answers: 我姐姐比我高。
姐姐比我高。

prompt_en: Say that you are learning to swim.
acceptable_answers: 我在学游泳。
我正在学游泳。

prompt_en: Say that there is a cat under the table.
acceptable_answers: 桌子下面有一只猫。
桌子下有一只猫。

prompt_en: Say that yesterday you went to see a movie.
acceptable_answers: 昨天我去看电影了。
我昨天去看了电影。

prompt_en: Say that you are too tired and want to rest.
acceptable_answers: 我太累了，想休息。
我太累了，我想休息一下。

prompt_en: Say that you gave him a book.
acceptable_answers: 我给他一本书。
我给了他一本书。

prompt_en: Say that it is raining outside, so bring an umbrella.
acceptable_answers: 外面下雨了，带伞吧。
外面在下雨，带把伞。

prompt_en: Say that the red one is more expensive than the blue one.
acceptable_answers: 红色的比蓝色的贵。
红的比蓝的贵。

prompt_en: Ask someone if they know how to cook.
acceptable_answers: 你会做饭吗？
你会不会做饭？

prompt_en: Say that you ran very fast.
acceptable_answers: 我跑得很快。
我跑得非常快。

prompt_en: Tell someone you have been to Beijing before.
acceptable_answers: 我以前去过北京。
我去过北京。

prompt_en: Say that it started raining.
acceptable_answers: 下雨了。
开始下雨了。

prompt_en: Describe someone who is currently sleeping.
acceptable_answers: 他正在睡觉。
他睡着了。
他正睡着呢。

prompt_en: Say that your older brother is taller than you.
acceptable_answers: 我哥哥比我高。
哥哥比我高。

prompt_en: Explain that you were late because the traffic was bad.
acceptable_answers: 因为堵车，所以我迟到了。
因为路上堵车，所以我迟到了。

prompt_en: Say that although the test was difficult, you passed it.
acceptable_answers: 虽然考试很难，但是我通过了。
虽然考试难，但是我过了。

prompt_en: Say that the weather is getting colder and colder.
acceptable_answers: 天气越来越冷了。
天气越来越冷。

prompt_en: Tell someone you have already eaten lunch.
acceptable_answers: 我已经吃过午饭了。
我已经吃了午饭了。
我吃过午饭了。

prompt_en: Say that you are sitting and reading a book.
acceptable_answers: 我坐着看书。
我坐着看书呢。

prompt_en: Say that this dish is not as tasty as that one.
acceptable_answers: 这个菜没有那个菜好吃。
这个菜不如那个菜好吃。

prompt_en: Tell someone you forgot to bring your umbrella.
acceptable_answers: 我忘了带伞了。
我忘了带雨伞。

prompt_en: Say that you have lived in Shanghai for three years.
acceptable_answers: 我在上海住了三年了。
我在上海住了三年。

prompt_en: Explain that because you are sick, you cannot go to work.
acceptable_answers: 因为我生病了，所以不能去上班。
因为生病了，所以我不能上班。

prompt_en: Say that your Chinese is getting better and better.
acceptable_answers: 我的中文越来越好了。
你的中文越来越好了。

prompt_en: Say that although he is young, he is very capable.
acceptable_answers: 虽然他很年轻，但是他很能干。
虽然他年轻，但是很有能力。

prompt_en: Tell someone the door is open.
acceptable_answers: 门开着呢。
门开着。

prompt_en: Say that today is even hotter than yesterday.
acceptable_answers: 今天比昨天还热。
今天比昨天更热。

prompt_en: Say that he not only speaks Chinese but also speaks Japanese.
acceptable_answers: 他不但会说中文，而且会说日语。
他不但会说中文，而且还会说日语。

prompt_en: Say that no matter how busy you are, you will exercise every day.
acceptable_answers: 无论多忙，我都会每天锻炼。
无论多么忙，我都每天锻炼。

prompt_en: Describe someone who is both smart and hardworking.
acceptable_answers: 她既聪明又努力。
他既聪明又勤奋。

prompt_en: Say that even a child can do this.
acceptable_answers: 连小孩子都会做这个。
连孩子都能做。

prompt_en: Say that your phone was broken by your younger brother.
acceptable_answers: 我的手机被弟弟弄坏了。
我的手机被弟弟摔坏了。

prompt_en: Say that no matter what he says, she will not believe him.
acceptable_answers: 无论他说什么，她都不会相信。
无论他怎么说，她都不相信他。

prompt_en: Say that this movie is not only funny but also meaningful.
acceptable_answers: 这部电影不但有趣，而且很有意义。
这部电影不但好笑，而且有意义。

prompt_en: Say that he did not even eat breakfast.
acceptable_answers: 他连早饭都没吃。
他连早餐都没吃。

prompt_en: Say that the homework was finished by the students.
acceptable_answers: 作业被学生们做完了。
作业被学生做完了。

prompt_en: Say that this place is both quiet and beautiful.
acceptable_answers: 这个地方既安静又漂亮。
这里既安静又美丽。

prompt_en: Say that regardless of the weather, the game will go on.
acceptable_answers: 无论天气怎么样，比赛都会继续。
无论天气如何，比赛都会进行。

prompt_en: Say that the cake was eaten by the cat.
acceptable_answers: 蛋糕被猫吃了。
蛋糕被猫吃掉了。

prompt_en: Say that he not only cooks well but also bakes well.
acceptable_answers: 他不但做饭做得好，而且烘焙也很好。
他不但会做菜，而且还会做蛋糕。

prompt_en: Say that even his name you cannot remember.
acceptable_answers: 连他的名字我都不记得了。
我连他的名字都忘了。

prompt_en: Describe someone who is both tall and strong.
acceptable_answers: 他既高又壮。
他既高大又强壮。

prompt_en: Say that the window was broken by the wind.
acceptable_answers: 窗户被风吹坏了。
窗户被风吹破了。

prompt_en: Say that no matter where you go, you will miss home.
acceptable_answers: 无论去哪里，我都会想家。
无论到哪儿，我都想家。

prompt_en: Say that even if it rains tomorrow, the event will still be held.
acceptable_answers: 即使明天下雨，活动也会照常举行。
即使明天下雨，也会举行活动。

prompt_en: Say that unless he apologizes, you will not forgive him.
acceptable_answers: 除非他道歉，否则我不会原谅他。
除非他道歉，不然我不原谅他。

prompt_en: Say that she not only sings well, but also dances beautifully.
acceptable_answers: 她不仅唱歌唱得好，还跳舞跳得很好。
她不仅歌唱得好，舞也跳得好。

prompt_en: Express surprise that he actually passed the exam.
acceptable_answers: 他竟然通过了考试。
没想到他竟然考过了。

prompt_en: Explain that the reason he succeeded is because he worked hard.
acceptable_answers: 他之所以成功，是因为他很努力。
他之所以能成功，是因为努力。

prompt_en: Say that even if the price is high, you still want to buy it.
acceptable_answers: 即使价格很高，我也想买。
即使贵，我也要买。

prompt_en: Say that unless you study hard, you will not pass.
acceptable_answers: 除非你努力学习，否则不会通过。
除非努力学习，否则考不过。

prompt_en: Express surprise that she actually quit her job.
acceptable_answers: 她竟然辞职了。
她竟然把工作辞了。

prompt_en: Say that he not only donated money, but also volunteered his time.
acceptable_answers: 他不仅捐了钱，还做了志愿者。
他不仅捐钱，还去当了志愿者。

prompt_en: Explain that the reason she is tired is because she stayed up late.
acceptable_answers: 她之所以很累，是因为熬夜了。
她之所以累，是因为昨晚熬夜了。

prompt_en: Say that even if he does not agree, we must proceed.
acceptable_answers: 即使他不同意，我们也必须继续。
即使他不同意，也得做下去。

prompt_en: Say that this city not only has good food, but also has beautiful scenery.
acceptable_answers: 这个城市不仅有好吃的，还有很美的风景。
这座城市不仅美食多，风景还很美。

prompt_en: Express surprise that the quiet student actually won first place.
acceptable_answers: 那个安静的学生竟然得了第一名。
那个安静的同学竟然拿了第一。

prompt_en: Explain that the reason traffic is bad is because there was an accident.
acceptable_answers: 之所以堵车，是因为出了车祸。
交通之所以不好，是因为发生了事故。

prompt_en: Say that unless you have a ticket, you cannot enter.
acceptable_answers: 除非你有票，否则不能进去。
除非有票，否则进不去。

prompt_en: Say that even if you are not hungry, you should eat something.
acceptable_answers: 即使不饿，也应该吃点东西。
即使你不饿，也得吃点儿东西。

prompt_en: Explain that the reason the project failed is because the planning was poor.
acceptable_answers: 项目之所以失败，是因为计划不好。
这个项目之所以失败了，是因为缺乏规划。

prompt_en: Say that he worked so hard that he damaged his health.
acceptable_answers: 他工作太拼命了，以至于身体出了问题。
他工作过度，以至于损害了健康。

prompt_en: Say that in order to achieve his dream, he spared no effort.
acceptable_answers: 为了实现梦想，他不惜一切代价。
他不惜付出一切来实现梦想。

prompt_en: Say that adults find this difficult, let alone children.
acceptable_answers: 大人都觉得难，何况孩子呢。
大人都做不到，何况小孩子。

prompt_en: Say that after all, he has many years of experience.
acceptable_answers: 毕竟他有多年的经验。
他毕竟有很多年的经验了。

prompt_en: Say that it is not just expensive, the quality is poor too.
acceptable_answers: 岂止贵，质量也很差。
岂止是贵，质量还差。

prompt_en: Say that the pollution was so severe that many people got sick.
acceptable_answers: 污染太严重了，以至于很多人生病了。
污染严重到以至于很多人都病了。

prompt_en: Say that she spared no expense on her child's education.
acceptable_answers: 她不惜花很多钱在孩子的教育上。
为了孩子的教育，她不惜花大量的钱。

prompt_en: Say that you cannot handle this job, let alone lead the whole team.
acceptable_answers: 我连这份工作都做不好，何况带领整个团队。
这个工作我都做不来，何况管理整个团队。

prompt_en: Say that after all, this is his first time, so we should be patient.
acceptable_answers: 毕竟这是他第一次，我们应该有耐心。
毕竟是第一次嘛，我们要有耐心。

prompt_en: Say it is not just rain, it is a full-blown storm.
acceptable_answers: 岂止是下雨，简直是暴风雨。
岂止下雨，这是暴风雨啊。

prompt_en: Say that he was so obsessed with gaming that his grades dropped sharply.
acceptable_answers: 他沉迷于游戏，以至于成绩大幅下降。
他太沉迷游戏了，以至于成绩下滑了。

prompt_en: Say that after all, she is your mother, you should call her.
acceptable_answers: 毕竟她是你妈妈，你应该给她打电话。
她毕竟是你母亲，应该打个电话。

prompt_en: Say that in order to win the contract, they spared no effort in their preparation.
acceptable_answers: 为了赢得合同，他们不惜一切做准备。
他们不惜一切努力来争取这个合同。

prompt_en: Say that even an expert cannot solve this, let alone a beginner.
acceptable_answers: 专家都解决不了这个问题，何况初学者。
连专家都解决不了，何况新手呢。

prompt_en: Say that it is not just a mistake, it is a catastrophe.
acceptable_answers: 岂止是错误，简直是灾难。
这岂止是个错误，这是灾难。

prompt_en: Say that the noise was so loud that nobody could sleep.
acceptable_answers: 噪音太大了，以至于谁都睡不着。
噪音大到以至于没有人能睡觉。

prompt_en: Say that after all, Rome was not built in a day.
acceptable_answers: 毕竟罗马不是一天建成的。
毕竟冰冻三尺非一日之寒。

prompt_en: Say in formal register that only through cooperation can mutual benefit be achieved.
acceptable_answers: 唯有通过合作，方能实现互利共赢。
只有合作，才能实现互利。

prompt_en: State formally that this policy has been implemented since last year.
acceptable_answers: 该政策自去年起已开始实施。
此政策自去年以来一直在实施。

prompt_en: Say formally that the results far exceeded expectations.
acceptable_answers: 结果远远超出了预期。
成果远超预期。

prompt_en: Say that he was so angry that he could barely contain himself.
acceptable_answers: 他气得几乎无法自控。
他愤怒得差点儿控制不住自己。

prompt_en: State that regardless of the outcome, this experience was valuable.
acceptable_answers: 不管结果如何，这次经历都是宝贵的。
无论结果怎样，这段经历弥足珍贵。

prompt_en: Say formally that in light of the above reasons, we propose the following plan.
acceptable_answers: 鉴于以上原因，我们提出以下方案。
鉴于上述原因，我们提议如下方案。

prompt_en: Say that his speech moved the audience to tears.
acceptable_answers: 他的演讲把观众感动得流泪了。
他的演讲感动得观众流下了眼泪。

prompt_en: Say formally that this issue warrants further investigation.
acceptable_answers: 此问题有待进一步调查。
这个问题值得进一步研究。

prompt_en: State that as a matter of fact, the situation is more complicated than it appears.
acceptable_answers: 事实上，情况比看起来更复杂。
实际上，事情远比表面上更复杂。

prompt_en: Say formally that efforts should be made to avoid similar incidents.
acceptable_answers: 应当尽力避免类似事件的发生。
应该努力避免此类事件再次发生。

prompt_en: Say that the meeting was so boring he almost fell asleep.
acceptable_answers: 会议无聊得他差点儿睡着了。
开会无聊得他几乎要睡着了。

prompt_en: Say formally that given the current circumstances, we must adjust our strategy.
acceptable_answers: 鉴于目前的形势，我们必须调整策略。
鉴于当前情况，我们须调整战略。

prompt_en: State that only by reforming education can we cultivate true talent.
acceptable_answers: 唯有改革教育，方能培养真正的人才。
只有通过教育改革，才能培养出真正的人才。

prompt_en: Say that the economy has been declining since the beginning of the year.
acceptable_answers: 自年初以来，经济一直在下滑。
经济自年初起持续下降。

prompt_en: Say formally that the data remains to be verified.
acceptable_answers: 数据尚有待核实。
这些数据有待进一步核实。

prompt_en: State that she ran so fast that no one could catch up.
acceptable_answers: 她跑得太快了，谁都追不上。
她跑得快到没有人追得上。

prompt_en: Say formally that all parties concerned should fulfill their respective obligations.
acceptable_answers: 各方应当履行各自的义务。
有关各方应当履行其相应的义务。

prompt_en: Write a formal statement that the committee has reached a consensus on the proposal.
acceptable_answers: 委员会就该提案已达成共识。
委员会对此提案已形成一致意见。

prompt_en: State formally that this document shall take effect upon the date of signing.
acceptable_answers: 本文件自签署之日起生效。
此文件于签署之日起开始生效。

prompt_en: State that in an academic context, the hypothesis has yet to be substantiated by empirical evidence.
acceptable_answers: 该假说尚未得到实证数据的证实。
这一假设至今尚缺乏实证依据。

prompt_en: Say formally that upon careful consideration, the board has decided to postpone the merger.
acceptable_answers: 经过慎重考虑，董事会决定推迟合并。
经慎重考量，董事会决定推迟此次并购。

prompt_en: State that the research findings are consistent with previous studies.
acceptable_answers: 研究结果与先前的研究一致。
本研究的发现与以往研究的结论相符。

prompt_en: State formally that all provisions herein shall be interpreted in accordance with applicable laws.
acceptable_answers: 本文所有条款均应依据适用法律进行解释。
本协议各条款应按照相关法律予以解释。

prompt_en: Write that the survey indicates a significant shift in public opinion.
acceptable_answers: 调查显示公众舆论发生了显著变化。
该调查表明公众意见出现了重大转变。

prompt_en: State formally that the two sides have agreed to establish a joint working group.
acceptable_answers: 双方已同意成立联合工作组。
两方已就成立联合工作小组达成一致。

prompt_en: State in academic register that this phenomenon merits further scholarly inquiry.
acceptable_answers: 该现象值得进一步的学术探讨。
此现象有待学术界进一步深入研究。

prompt_en: State that the report concludes that urgent measures are needed to address climate change.
acceptable_answers: 报告得出结论，需要采取紧急措施应对气候变化。
该报告的结论是：必须采取紧急措施来应对气候变化。

prompt_en: Say in formal register that the amendment has been ratified by a two-thirds majority.
acceptable_answers: 该修正案已获得三分之二多数的批准。
此修正案已经由三分之二多数票通过。

prompt_en: State that the company's annual revenue has grown by 15 percent year-on-year.
acceptable_answers: 公司年收入同比增长了百分之十五。
该公司的年度营收同比增长了15%。

prompt_en: Write formally that the defendant is presumed innocent until proven guilty.
acceptable_answers: 被告在被证明有罪之前应被推定为无罪。
被告未经定罪前，应推定其无罪。

prompt_en: State in academic register that the sample size was insufficient to draw definitive conclusions.
acceptable_answers: 样本量不足以得出确定性结论。
由于样本规模有限，无法得出确切的结论。

prompt_en: State formally that the proposed regulations are subject to public consultation before enactment.
acceptable_answers: 拟议的法规在颁布前须经公众咨询。
该法规草案在实施前需要征求公众意见。

prompt_en: Write in professional register that the quarterly performance indicators have met or exceeded all benchmarks.
acceptable_answers: 季度绩效指标均已达到或超过各项基准。
本季度各项绩效指标已全部达标或超标。

prompt_en: State in academic register that further research is warranted to elucidate the underlying mechanisms.
acceptable_answers: 有必要进一步研究以阐明其内在机制。
需要开展进一步研究来揭示潜在的机理。

prompt_en: Write a formal diplomatic statement that both nations reaffirm their commitment to peaceful resolution of disputes.
acceptable_answers: 两国重申致力于通过和平方式解决争端。
双方再次确认以和平手段解决分歧的承诺。

prompt_en: State in literary register that the passage of time renders all glory ephemeral.
acceptable_answers: 岁月流逝，一切荣耀终将化为泡影。
时光荏苒，所有辉煌终归虚无。

prompt_en: Write an academic statement that the correlation between the two variables does not imply causation.
acceptable_answers: 两个变量之间的相关性并不意味着因果关系。
两变量间存在相关性，但并不代表存在因果关系。

prompt_en: Write a formal statement that the summit aims to forge a framework for multilateral cooperation.
acceptable_answers: 此次峰会旨在构建多边合作框架。
本次峰会的目标是建立多边合作的框架。

prompt_en: State in philosophical register that true wisdom lies in recognizing the limits of one's knowledge.
acceptable_answers: 真正的智慧在于认识到自身知识的局限性。
大智在于知其所不知。

prompt_en: Write a formal legal statement that any breach of contract shall entitle the aggrieved party to seek damages.
acceptable_answers: 任何违约行为均赋予受损方索赔的权利。
如有违约，受损害方有权要求赔偿。

prompt_en: Write in academic register that the theoretical model proposed herein integrates findings from multiple disciplines.
acceptable_answers: 本文提出的理论模型整合了多个学科的研究成果。
此处所提出的理论模型融合了跨学科的研究发现。

prompt_en: State formally that the government pledges to uphold the rule of law and safeguard citizens' rights.
acceptable_answers: 政府承诺维护法治、保障公民权利。
政府郑重承诺将捍卫法治并保障公民的合法权益。

prompt_en: Write in literary register that beneath the calm surface, currents of change were already stirring.
acceptable_answers: 看似风平浪静的表面之下，变革的暗流早已涌动。
在平静的表象之下，变革的潮流已悄然涌动。

prompt_en: Write an academic conclusion that notwithstanding certain limitations, this study contributes meaningfully to the existing body of literature.
acceptable_answers: 尽管存在一定的局限性，本研究仍对现有文献做出了有意义的贡献。
虽有局限，但本研究对已有学术文献有着重要的补充意义。

prompt_en: State in diplomatic language that the parties express their deep concern over the escalating tensions in the region.
acceptable_answers: 各方对该地区不断升级的紧张局势表示深切关注。
各方就该区域局势的持续紧张深表关切。

prompt_en: Write in formal register that the institution shall undertake a comprehensive review of its governance structure.
acceptable_answers: 该机构将对其治理结构进行全面审查。
本机构应就其治理架构开展全面评估。

prompt_en: Write a philosophical statement that the pursuit of truth demands both intellectual humility and relentless inquiry.
acceptable_answers: 追求真理既需要理性的谦逊，也需要不懈的探索。
对真理的追求要求我们既保持理智上的谦虚，又坚持不懈地探究。

prompt_en: State in academic register that the methodological approach adopted in this study draws upon both qualitative and quantitative paradigms.
acceptable_answers: 本研究所采用的方法论兼顾了定性与定量研究范式。
本研究的方法论综合运用了定性和定量两种研究范式。

prompt_en: Write in literary/poetic register that all rivers eventually find their way to the sea, just as all journeys lead us home.
acceptable_answers: 百川终归大海，正如万途皆通归处。
百川东到海，一切旅途终归故里。

prompt_en: Write formally that the signatories hereby pledge to abide by the terms and conditions set forth in this agreement.
acceptable_answers: 签署方在此承诺遵守本协议所规定的各项条款和条件。
各签署方特此承诺严格遵守本协议所列各项条款。

prompt_en: Write in formal policy register that sustainable development necessitates balancing economic growth with environmental stewardship.
acceptable_answers: 可持续发展要求在经济增长与环境保护之间取得平衡。
实现可持续发展须兼顾经济增长与生态环境的保护。

prompt_en: Write in literary register that memory, like water, seeps into every crack and nourishes what lies dormant.
acceptable_answers: 记忆如水，渗透每一道缝隙，滋养沉睡的万物。
记忆宛如流水，渗入每处裂痕，润泽蛰伏之物。
